span.p:
EngineInput
cases · shifts · locations · pickupProfiles · effortVectors

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
0 · SHIFT-END CUTOFF — autoAssignableCapacityMinutes()
map shifts → cutoff-effective copies (Pkt 5, config.shiftEnd)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 · ENRICH — enrichCase()
classifyPriority() → rank 0–6
computeEffort() → minutes + points

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5 · DELIVERY GROUPS — detectDeliveryGroups() → indexDeliveryGroups()
same Lieferschein / consecutive WE-Beleg run → groupIdByCaseId (Pkt 1)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 · DISTRIBUTE — distributeBundlesByWeightedLoad()
LPT over effective shifts; score = load_ratio + specialist + heavy + bereich;
soft delivery-group affinity
merge protos → one AssignmentBundle / employee

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 · PICKUP — resolvePickup() → buildPickupSequence()
per bundle: type→number order (§D.3), never feeds back

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

AssignmentPlan
bundles · pickupSequences · unassigned · loads · diagnostics
